description.value:
Trigger An enemy you can sense rolls for initiative.

You've mastered reading people in all circumstances, even before a fight breaks out. Roll Perception to [[/act sense-motive]] against your target. If you succeed, your initiative roll is equal to the target's initiative plus 1. If you critically succeed, your initiative is equal to the target's initiative plus 2, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] to you until the start of its turn.
